title: MDDC QG-DCA Reproducibility Package: Qualification-Gated Defense-Capital Accounting for Context-Qualified AI Security
description: Reproducibility package for the MDDC/QG-DCA measurement-paper experiments. The package contains scripts, result tables, figures, reports, pre-registration notes, version-control guardrails, and metadata for qualification-gated defense-capital accounting experiments over ASRDataset/VulGenie-derived artifacts, CVEfixes, BigVul, MegaVul, security-kg, CIRCL vulnerability-scores, KEV/NVD/EPSS replay outputs, and repair-audit pools. The package supports false security-capital admission, validation-debt, matched-recall baseline, operating-curve selection, cost-model sensitivity, provenance-stress testing, internal accounting-component ablation, GLM-assisted candidate-oracle calibration, and activation-frontier analyses. GLM is used only as a candidate predicate generator; qualification remains controlled by objective gates. The package does not claim human semantic ground truth, SOTA repair, or deployment-rate superiority.
